LanguageData.GR_AutonomousWeapons_Scorned.description: To create automated defences is a waste of time and good material, which could be better spent raising far deadlier animals.
LanguageData.GR_AutonomousWeapons_Scorned.label: scorned
LanguageData.GR_Failures_Accepted.description: Genetic experimentation is risky, and we must accept that failures are an unavoidable part of the process.
LanguageData.GR_Failures_Accepted.label: accepted
LanguageData.GR_Failures_Disliked.description: If a genetic experiment fails catastrophically, it is our duty to get rid of the unwanted results as soon as possible.
LanguageData.GR_Failures_Disliked.label: disliked
LanguageData.GR_Failures_Shameful.description: We are destined to greatness. Failure is not an option, and any unwanted results of our experimentations should be gotten rid of as soon as possible.
LanguageData.GR_Failures_Shameful.label: shameful
LanguageData.GR_HumanoidHybrids_Accepted.description: Humanoid experimentation is just another tool at our disposal.
LanguageData.GR_HumanoidHybrids_Accepted.label: accepted
LanguageData.GR_HumanoidHybrids_Disliked.label: disliked
LanguageData.GR_HumanoidHybrids_Forbidden.description: Humanoid experimentation is despicable, an absolutely unforgivable sin. We will not tolerate having such monstrosities running around the colony.
LanguageData.GR_HumanoidHybrids_Forbidden.label: forbidden
LanguageData.GR_WorktableSpeeds_Genomorpher.descripti:
Measure twice, cut once. A carefully designed experiment has much greater odds of success.

<color=#E5E54C>Stats:</color>
 - Genomorpher speed: +25%.
LanguageData.GR_WorktableSpeeds_Genomorpher.label: genomorpher
LanguageData.GR_WorktableSpeeds_Implants.description:
The key to experimentation is not being afraid of the results. We will labour incessantly to achieve new breakthroughs.

<color=#E5E54C>Stats:</color>
 - Implant augmentator work table speed: +25%.
LanguageData.GR_WorktableSpeeds_Implants.label: implants
